ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the priority level */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status level */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue type */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was last updated */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of how the issue was resolved */,
  "estimated_resolution_date" TEXT /* Estimated date for resolution */,
  "actual_resolution_date" TEXT /* Actual date of resolution */,
  "reproducibility" TEXT /* How often the issue can be reproduced */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the issue was found (e.g., development, staging, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES issue_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES issue_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES issue_priority ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the issue type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the issue type (e.g., technical, functional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_priority" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the priority level */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Numerical weight for sorting and analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status level */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the status level */,
  "next_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the next possible status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_internal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is internal */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment resolved the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the issue is assigned to */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was assigned */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for resolving the issue */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the assignment is completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, administrator) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., status update, priority update) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_changes_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_tags_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., time to resolve, number of comments) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., days, hours, number) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., manual input, automated system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_metrics_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)
